abilities.name: Banished Knowledge
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
An Ally within :{SOI}: Gains :{Haste}:.
Reduce the :{SP}: cost of the Discipline by 1 if the target is an ally other than yourself.
abilities.flavorText: There is safety in not knowing.

abilities.name: Last Laugh
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
If you or a :{Loyal Esper}: is Defeated, the figure that dealt the Damage is dealt their 2 :{Conviction Dice}: worth of :{Magic Dmg}:.
:{Exhaust}:
When you or a :{Loyal Esper}: is dealt Damage by an opponent, you may deal the source of that Damage 2 :{Irreducible Dmg}:.

abilities.name: Familiar
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
After learning this Discipline, choose a :{Familar}: and place it face up next to your Adventurer card.
Your :{Familar}: cannot be changed.

abilities.name: Forebode
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
At any time, re-roll a roll you made or that was made against you. Limited by your highest :{Lvl}: :{Assemblage}: Discipline.
:{Lvl 1}:+: Dodge rolls or Skill Check rolls
:{Lvl 2}:+: Spell Casting rolls
:{Lvl 3}:+: Conviction rolls or Attack rolls
:{Lvl 4}:+: Any rolls

abilities.name: Perfect Love
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
Before an ally within :{SOI}: would :{Determine Damage}: from an Attack made against them, or :{Resolve the Spell's Effect}: from a Spell made against them, :{Redirect}: to yourself or a :{Loyal Esper}:.
abilities.flavorText: There is no fear in love.

abilities.name: Euthanasia
abilities.description:
Cast a :{Spell 6}:.
Inflict :{Wilt}: and deal 4 :{Magic Damage}:. Then, if the target was already Inflicted with :{Wilt}:, Inflict :{Condemn}:. If they were already Inflicted with both :{Condemn}: and :{Wilt}:, roll the :{Black Die}:. If :{Skull}: is rolled, the target is defeated.

abilities.name: Sanctuary
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
At any time, an ally within :{SOI}: may :{Dodge}:.

abilities.name: BFF
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
At any time, when making an Attack, you or a :{Loyal Esper}: you've Summoned Gains the following:
:[:{Star}: :{FU}:: :{Move 3}: spaces without provoking Break Attacks, then make a :{Melee/Ranged Attack}: :{Atk}: against a different target.]:

abilities.name: Imposed Paradigm
abilities.description:
Cast a :{Spell 6}:.
:{Swap}: places with the target.
abilities.flavorText: A lie told often enough becomes the truth.

abilities.name: Possession
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
A :{Loyal Esper}: within :{SOI}: makes a :{Melee/Ranged Attack}: :{Atk}: or you may spend 1 :{SP}: and another ally within :{SOI}: makes a :{Melee/Ranged Attack}: *ATK* instead.
abilities.flavorText: Let us end this debate! There is such thing as free will, and I shall take yours as my own.

abilities.name: Ruination
abilities.description:
Cast a :{Spell 6}: against up to 2 different opponents within :{SOI}:. Reduce the :{SP}: cost of this discipline by 1 if all targets have an :{Effect}:
Roll your :{Casting Die}:, deal :{Magic Dmg}: equal to the result.

abilities.name: Fortune Telling
abilities.description:
:{Once Per Encounter}:
After a figure within your :{SOI}: has rolled for any reason, choose the result of any single die except the :{Black Die}:.
abilities.flavorText: Fortune, good night; smile once more, turn thy wheel.

abilities.name: Summoning
abilities.description:
:{Once Per Encounter}:
Summon a :{Loyal Esper}: within your :{SOI}:. Then gain 1 :{Summon Token}:.
:{Passive}:
At anytime, :{Discard}: a :{Summon Token}: to reduce any non-:{Irreducible Damage}: being dealt to a :{Loyal Esper}: you control by 2.

abilities.name: Conduit Summoning
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
* Any time an opponent is Defeated within :{SOI}:, Earn their :{Conduit}: card.
* :{1 SP}:: At any time, replace your Adventurer card with a :{Conduit}: that you have Earned. Or, replace your current :{Conduit}: with your Adventurer card.

abilities.name: Exalted Summoning
abilities.description:
:{Once Per Encounter}:
Choose an :{Exalted Esper}: and use its Ability within :{SOI}:.

abilities.name: The Pessimist
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
When an opponent within :{SOI}: fails a Conviction Check by 3 or more, Inflict :{Condemn}:.
abilities.flavorText: With the choice of two evils, I'll take both.

abilities.name: Helping Hands
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
You may equip an additional :{Consumable}: and :{Relic}:.
:{Exhaust}:
Move up to 2 spaces. Gain :{Flight}: during this movement.

abilities.name: Resonance
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
:[:{Star}::{FU}:: Use an un-flipped Discipline you have learned that costs :{1-3 SP}:. Any Conditions excluding :{SP}: cost still apply. This Discipline may target a different figure.]:

abilities.name: Friends With Benefits
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
* When you use the Discipline :{Summoning}:, Gain 1 additional :{Summon Token}:.
* :{Loyal Espers}: you summon gain :{+1 Defense}:.

abilities.name: Felled Afterlife
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
When an opponent within your :{SOI}: is Defeated, this card Gains 1 :{Energy Token}:. (Limit 2). When determining the Force of a Spell, if you have 2 :{Energy Tokens}: on this card, Gain :{+1}: to the Force.
:{Once Per Encounter}:
Discard 2 :{Energy Tokens}: from this card to Gain 2 :{Enslaved Spirits}:.

abilities.name: The Tower Reversed
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
Cast a :{Spell 6}:.
Deal :{3 Magic Damage}: for each Effect the target has.
Then, Inflict :{Darkness}:, :{Disease}:, and :{Paralyze}:.

abilities.name: Soul Bond
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
* When you use the Discipline :{Summoning}:, Gain 1 additional :{Summon Token}:.
* Whenever a :{Loyal Esper}: you Summoned spends :{SP}: to make any Action or Ability, they may spend :{SP}: that you have availible instead of their own. If either you or your :{Loyal Espers}: Gain or lose a :{Positive Effect}:, you each also Gain or lose that Effect.
